programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is excited to move into her dorm, but her past choices present unexpected setbacks. Meanwhile, Damon and Coach Marcus are thrown a bigger curve ball than they were anticipating.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone works on a group assignment, Damon struggles to bond with the team, Keisha wrestles with letting go of her dream, and Amara feels the cost of being a whistleblower.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Damon and JR try to boost team morale, Simone extends an olive branch to Thea, and Keisha's secret is revealed. Plus, Coach Marcus makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: When the power goes out, everyone takes the time to reveal some surprising truths to each other. Meanwhile, Simone grapples with telling her friends about her son when she learns he will be in town for a visit.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is excited that Baby Shay is coming to town, but another visitor she wasn't expecting surprises her as well. Damon struggles on the field. A family drama could threaten his new bond with his mum.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is excited that Baby Shay is coming to town, but another visitor she wasn't expecting surprises her as well. Damon struggles on the field. A family drama could threaten his new bond with his mum.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: When Simone is faced with her first college level tournament, she learns she has to conquer an unexpected bigger foe and gets some sage advice from Thea.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: When Damon goes home for a quick trip to get answers from his father about his adoption, Simone drops everything to be his support system.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone and the gang rally around Amara as she struggles with what to do next, an old teammate could possibly derail the all-HBCU baseball game, and Thea has a close call with danger.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone throws herself into distraction, Damon finds help from Thea, and JR realises he needs to change how he sees himself. Plus, Coach Marcus' paranoia is at an all-time high.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone throws herself into distraction, Damon finds help from Thea, and JR realises he needs to change how he sees himself. Plus, Coach Marcus' paranoia is at an all-time high.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: During Homecoming week, Simone and Thea get ready to compete in a professional tournament. Also, coach Marcus reveals a secret, and Keisha is ready to face her fears.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: During Homecoming week, Simone and Thea get ready to compete in a professional tournament. Also, coach Marcus reveals a secret, and Keisha is ready to face her fears.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone learns what it's like to be top six, Damon is faced with a decision, and Keisha reverts to her old ways. Meanwhile, Amara and Coach Marcus adjust to new challenges.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone learns what it's like to be top six, Damon is faced with a decision, and Keisha reverts to her old ways. Meanwhile, Amara and Coach Marcus adjust to new challenges.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is at odds with her teammates, Damon is stressed about his decision, and Keisha is all in on her new dance major. Cam hits a snag with his financial aid.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is at odds with her teammates, Damon is stressed about his decision, and Keisha is all in on her new dance major. Cam hits a snag with his financial aid.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone reclaims her power on and off the court, Damon ignoring his unresolved relationship with Jessie leads to conflict, and Cam has an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone reclaims her power on and off the court, Damon ignoring his unresolved relationship with Jessie leads to conflict, and Cam has an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Bringston shelters in place over a disturbing call, Simone finds comfort from someone unexpected, and Damon decides about his birth parents. Nate goes missing.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Bringston shelters in place over a disturbing call, Simone finds comfort from someone unexpected, and Damon decides about his birth parents. Nate goes missing.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Amara gives everyone a mental health day. Simone struggles with relaxing, Damon feels insecure about his relationship with Thea, and coach Marcus steps up for Cam.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Amara gives everyone a mental health day. Simone struggles with relaxing, Damon feels insecure about his relationship with Thea, and coach Marcus steps up for Cam.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Still not getting the sisterhood bond she craves from the tennis team, Simone's interest in joining a sorority grows, but she runs into some roadblocks.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Still not getting the sisterhood bond she craves from the tennis team, Simone's interest in joining a sorority grows, but she runs into some roadblocks.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is trying to break her long-running tennis curse by acing her presentation and dealing with boy drama, but a blast from her past brings its own drama.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is trying to break her long-running tennis curse by acing her presentation and dealing with boy drama, but a blast from her past brings its own drama.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Once again, Simone's world has been rocked leaving her no choice but to stand up for herself with her support system fighting right by her side.

programme.title: Libertad
programme.desc: In the Spain of the early 19th century there is no place for everyone, much less for traitors. A woman nicknamed La Llanera is released from prison after 17 years.

Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestants battle each other and Mother Nature during challenges that involve hurricane-force winds and rain, Madagascar hissing cockroaches, and a simulated flash flood.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten new participants have a chance to win $500,000 as they try their best to survive in one of Earth's harshest locations. The survivalists struggle acclimating to their home while predators encircle their camps.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Verne Troyer and Nyima Funk feature as special guests.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team is ecstatic when a recent theory about Nolan's Cross comes to fruition while they prepare for a European adventure on the horizon.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestants battle each other and Mother Nature during challenges that involve hurricane-force winds and rain, Madagascar hissing cockroaches, and a simulated flash flood.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: Velma races against the clock to find the true serial killer. Daphne pursues a new career path. Fred finds a way to channel his rage. Norville tries to get far away from his former best friend.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: In this episode, we kick things off by enjoying a sprinkling of the white stuff in Snow Joke, before taking the law into our own hands and locking up some errant motorists Behind Bars.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Michael Weatherly and Greg Proops feature as special guests.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Byambajav Ulambayar and Gary Anthony Williams feature as special guests.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette runs into an old friend and pretends to be a customer, not an employee, to avoid embarrassment.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame takes on the Great Central Road for the first time since The Wet; Robbie Mackay struggles to keep 35 tonnes worth of house rolling; Mick Brett moves a huge tower 511 km from the Port of Newcastle.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: New business owners Darrell and Lisa receive a high-stakes mission, and Todd Dewey runs into trouble with a government contract. Meanwhile, rookie Mike Simmons tries to get over the hump on his first solo delivery.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Things 'go south' when Craig's brother, Brent, borrows a logging machine, leading to a risky mountainside recovery.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Placentia, the ladies from Vegas try out their own bidding style. Brandi and Jarrod try to phone it in, while Kenny and his brother show everyone that family comes second.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A motorcyclist's world is turned upside down in the Victoria Park Tunnel. Truckies take risks and pay the price. A motorway wanderer talks of the time he got trespassed.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: One speeder will not stop, and the next will not give over his details. It's a Christmas miracle, when Senior Constable Hartnell convinces a stubborn truckie that seatbelts are worth wearing.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Things 'go south' when Craig's brother, Brent, borrows a logging machine, leading to a risky mountainside recovery.

programme.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the world's rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette must test Noa's driving skills while Ceci helps Barb prepare for her new manager portrait.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette runs into an old friend and pretends to be a customer, not an employee, to avoid embarrassment.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away, leaving them only scraps. Kenny uses Mary as a Dave shield, and the two find their way to a decent unit of their own.

programme.desc: The 10-over format gets underway in UAE with Marcus Stonis, Tim David and more competing for this year's T10 title.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 1st Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Haunted by his failure to protect JFK in Dallas, a Secret Service agent is taunted by a psychopath stalking the current president.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Haunted by his failure to protect JFK in Dallas, a Secret Service agent is taunted by a psychopath stalking the current president.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: In this rock 'n' roll spy spoof, an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys renovate their pool; Donna and Paul install a large window; Lee fractures his foot just before the wedding season's first couple arrives.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce meets a Highland Games commentator with treasures including a shot put, a hammer and a brooch from Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Presenter Charlie Ross is joined by experts Kate Bliss and Ben Cooper at the antique shops of Newark. Charlie also learns about the temperance movement in Newark.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman and her 68-year-old mother are involved in a serious car crash. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old boy is rushed into Emergency after falling from a chair at a wedding.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow is at Christchurch Park in Ipswich, where treasures include an Imperial Chinese porcelain vase and some portraits relating to the Profumo scandal.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning takes up the reins with experts Philip Serrell and Tim Weeks from the Royal Cornwall Showground in Wadebridge.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Alison Hammond's Florida Unpacked
programme.desc: Former tour rep Alison and son Aidan head to Florida seeking family adventure in true American style. Can they embrace the Sunshine State without blowing their budget?

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Jane Hall and Khanh Ong embrace Thailand with Bangkok luxury, river cruises, rooftop bars, Phuket beaches, spa rituals, and cooking classes.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In Week three, the sewers tackle travel-themed challenges: a summer blouse from tablecloths, nautical bags in the Transformation, and Riviera-inspired outfits in Made to Measure. Who will impress?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Molly met Tom while backpacking. They fell in love and started life and a family in Mt Isa. With most of Molly's relatives based in Brisbane, including her ill father, the family wish to renovate, sell and move.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah helps a couple from Tasmania find their first home in the Wye Valley and chats with Kate Humble at her countryside farm.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce meets a Highland Games commentator with treasures including a shot put, a hammer and a brooch from Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey & Joel bought Adelaide's worst house. Tracey loves their 90-year-old home, but Joel finds it too small. Will Andrew find a better home, or will Neale's renovation solve it?

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Melissa visits the Tesselaar Tulip Festival, without the crowds, to check out the amazing wonderland of spring flowering colour. The superstars of the show are the tulips, aka the queen of bulbs.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Dordogne, Tim and Owen complete their pool and terrace; in Normandy, Terry and Ashley fit a fireplace.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.sub-title: South East London and Devon Revisit
programme.desc: We revisit Carol, Alan and their daughter Lauren to see if they found a rural spot with enough land for Lauren's dog training business. Later, we see if Ros and Hannah found their dream home.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Anand and his parents are ready to leave Melbourne and make the move to sunny Queensland to join their extended family. His 1970s house was passed at auction, so can the team help update its retro look and sell it?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: This time on the 'Box: Coronation Street, Love Island, Countdown, Clarkson's Farm, Gary Barlow's Food and Wine Tour: Australia and Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen.

programme.title: Who Will Love My Doggy?
programme.desc: This series has a simple mission - to find loving new homes for dogs whose previous owners can no longer care for them.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 10-month-old baby is rushed in after her parents finds she has stopped breathing; a 21-year-old expectant dad falls 9m in a motorcycle crash.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers: D'artagnan
programme.desc: France. D'Artagnan arrives in Paris trying to find his attackers after being left for dead, which leads him to a real war where the future of France is at stake.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers: D'artagnan
programme.desc: France. D'Artagnan arrives in Paris trying to find his attackers after being left for dead, which leads him to a real war where the future of France is at stake.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Air Marshal Bill Marks receives cryptic text messages during a flight demanding the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account - or a passenger will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Air Marshal Bill Marks receives cryptic text messages during a flight demanding the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account - or a passenger will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is racing to solve the mystery of his past while being hunted by the very organisation that hired him.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around UN employee Gerry Lane, who travels the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Vampire Bats
programme.desc: A college professor (Lucy Lawless) tries to stop aggressive, mutated bats killing people in Louisiana.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: The crypto-zoological agency Monarch faces off against the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis: the three-headed King Ghidorah.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Fearsome monsters Godzilla and King Kong square off in an epic battle for the ages, while humanity looks to wipe out both of the creatures and take back the planet once and for all.

programme.title: Dragonheart: Vengeance
programme.desc: After his family is killed, Lukas sets out on an epic quest for revenge, forming an unlikely trio with an ice breathing dragon and a swashbuckling mercenary.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: Jake, a once-promising Jaeger pilot, has given up his training only to be caught up in a criminal underworld. He's given one last chance when an unstoppable threat is unleashed.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: Jake, a once-promising Jaeger pilot, has given up his training only to be caught up in a criminal underworld. He's given one last chance when an unstoppable threat is unleashed.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: Jake, a once-promising Jaeger pilot, has given up his training only to be caught up in a criminal underworld. He's given one last chance when an unstoppable threat is unleashed.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After years of fighting in the Crusades, Robin of Loxley returns to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all thanks to the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After years of fighting in the Crusades, Robin of Loxley returns to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all thanks to the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a street-racing gang led by Dom Toretto, whose fans treat him like a rock star. Dirty money, big-rig hijacking, and high-octane action rev up this thrill ride.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: A rising criminal mastermind known as The Joker thrusts Gotham into anarchy and forces Batman closer to crossing the fine line between hero and vigilante.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: It has been years since Batman vanished into the night, turning from hero to fugitive. Everything will change with the arrival of a cunning cat burglar, and the emergence of masked terrorist, Bane.

programme.title: Apples Never Fall
programme.desc: Stan's erratic behaviour fuels suspicion as a damning new piece of evidence in Joy's disappearance arises.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Following his shootout with Bianca, the Jackal must escape his captors and regroup ahead of his hit on UDC. Meanwhile, Bianca tracks his trail of devastation through the Hungarian countryside.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: When Cedeiraas mayor is murdered, Toms, the only witness, starts to ask his own questions.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: Despite Maite warning him to back off, Tomas is getting increasingly intrigued by the case.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: A fight between farmers over land turns ugly when one of them turns up dead - a victim of an obscure poison.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families. Pamela deals with protesters demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
All Her Fault
programme.desc: A revelation from Alcaras turns suspicion on the entire Irvine family, exposing a secret that could tear them apart.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: The Irvines try to adapt to a new reality while Jenny uncovers clues that could shift the investigation.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: The Jackal and Bianca both descend on Tallinn in anticipation of UDC's announcement. With the venue in lockdown, and Bianca closing in, the Jackal must use all his wiles as he prepares to take his shot.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families. Pamela deals with protesters demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan.

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: Max and JJ attempt to reach Marrakech through Syria, where one's past resurfaces. Meanwhile, Cassie's ex-CIA colleague Mark Ellis arrives to help track them down.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappeared them from the Commonwealth.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: The Irvines try to adapt to a new reality while Jenny uncovers clues that could shift the investigation.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: A revelation from Alcaras turns suspicion on the entire Irvine family, exposing a secret that could tear them apart.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: In the steamy second chapter of the best-selling blockbuster, a wounded Christian tries to entice a cautious Ana back into his life.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: A poignant and often hilarious story about Shelby, a headstrong young girl about to get married, with six amazing women providing strength, friendship and love in a small southern town.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: A poignant and often hilarious story about Shelby, a headstrong young girl about to get married, with six amazing women providing strength, friendship and love in a small southern town.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Morty and other zoo animals find a way to escape from Madagascar when the penguins reassemble a wrecked airplane. The precariously repaired craft stays airborne just long enough to make it to the African continent. There the New Yorkers encounter members of their own species for the first time. Africa proves to be a wild place, but Alex and company wonder if it is better than their Central Park home.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: In the final chapter of this popular animation franchise, Mike Myers voices Shrek, who is not scaring villagers away like he used to, but now agrees to autograph pitch forks. Longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, Shrek is duped into signing a pact with the smooth-talking deal-maker, Rumpelstiltskin (Walt Dohrn). Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king and Shrek and Fiona (Cameron Diaz) have never met. Shrek must undo all he's done in the hope of saving his friends, restoring his world and reclaiming his one true love.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru. With the help of Jeff, his faithful dog, an intrepid teacher, a mute parrot and a hustler, they will try to save the mythical Lost City of the Incas from an evil band of treasure hunters.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel creates a couple of mischievous Smurf-like creatures called the Naughties hoping they will let him harness the magical Smurf-essence. However, he soon discovers that he needs the help of Smurfette, who knows the secret to turning the Naughties into real Smurfs. When Gargamel and his Naughties kidnap Smurfette from Smurf Village and bring her to Paris, it's up to Papa, Clumsy, Grouchy and Vanity to reunite with their human friends, Patrick and Grace Winslow, and rescue her!

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel creates a couple of mischievous Smurf-like creatures called the Naughties hoping they will let him harness the magical Smurf-essence. However, he soon discovers that he needs the help of Smurfette, who knows the secret to turning the Naughties into real Smurfs. When Gargamel and his Naughties kidnap Smurfette from Smurf Village and bring her to Paris, it's up to Papa, Clumsy, Grouchy and Vanity to reunite with their human friends, Patrick and Grace Winslow, and rescue her!

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping New Jersey malls safe, an overzealous security guard learns that duty never rests when he heads to Las Vegas for a well-earned vacation with his teen daughter.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping New Jersey malls safe, an overzealous security guard learns that duty never rests when he heads to Las Vegas for a well-earned vacation with his teen daughter.

programme.title: Kicking & Screaming
programme.desc: The coach of a hopeless kids' soccer team is headed for a showdown with his ultra-competitive father, but he has to toughen up if his squad has any chance of winning.

programme.title: Kicking & Screaming
programme.desc: The coach of a hopeless kids' soccer team is headed for a showdown with his ultra-competitive father, but he has to toughen up if his squad has any chance of winning.
